title: Sending an email to someone who is not a Monday.com user
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have been working on this for a while and cannot figure it out. I would appreciate any feedback. 
Is it possible to email someone through an automation who is not a user of Monday.com?

posts.author: KTillack (Keaton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have been working on this for a while and cannot figure it out. I would appreciate any feedback.

Is it possible to email someone through an automation who is not a user of Monday.com?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KTillack - you can integrate monday with GMail/Outlook quite easily to send messages to any email address rather than a monday account. It does depend on what automations you are using but it certainly is possible.

Gmail Integration – Support (monday.com)
Outlook Integration – Support (monday.com)

If you ever need further support feel free to reach out anytime.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Richardavie (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml: I also have this question, any updates?
